titleStmt.title: SII 23.581: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 581. (A.R. No. 581 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 4th tier of the same base Kulōttuṅga-Chōla III. Year 31: 1208-09 A.D.

summary.p: The cyclic year is also given as Vibhava. This records a gift of two lampstands worth 15 māḍai and 180 kuḻi of land for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ Sokkapperumāḷ for the merit of his deceased mother Mēḍasāni by Bayirappi-Reḍḍi son of Bhūmi-Reḍḍi a maṉṟāḍuvār (assembly member) of Taṅgaṭṭūr in Mēṟpākkai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1vatu Āvatāna vibhavasamvatsarattu Āṉimāca matirācen=tiramaṇṭalattu meṟpākkai ṉāṭṭut taṅkaṭṭūr maṉṟāṭuvār pūmireṭṭiyār makan payirappi reṭṭiyen yeṅkaḷ tāyār meṭacāniyār cuvaṟkasta rāna piṉpu Avarukku naṉṟākaveṇumeṉṟu kulottuṅkacoḻaviṇṇakar Em perumān cokkapperumāḷukku Iraṇṭu tirunaṉtāviḷakku nitta cittamākac cellakkaṭavitāka Ivvemperumān
tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāna ṉāyakattevik kamukantoṭṭa ttukku vaṭakku tiru viṭaiyāṭṭamāna maṭuttūrattuk kuṭutta nilam kuḻi 100 8 10 yinnilam 100 8 10- til pokattile patiṉañcu māṭaiyāle Iraṇṭu tirukkutti viḷakkuṅ koṇṭu yiṭṭu Ittirunaṉtāviḷakku Iraṇṭu meṟṟina palam yeṅkaḷ tāyār meṭacāniyāṟku naṉṟāka Ittiru naṉtā viḷakku Iraṇṭum Aṉṟāṭu kūṭṭapperumakkaḷum śrīvaiṣaṇavarkaḷum Aṉusandhānam paṇṇi cantira Ā
titavarai celuttakkaṭavarkaḷāka Ittanmampaṇṇikkuṭutten paiyirappireṭṭi yeṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 23.581 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
